song.title: Be Glorified In Me
song.author: Tim Hughes
song.lyrics:
[V1] .E A D A Your love has captured me. .E A B Your grace has set me free .E A D A Your life, the air I breathe. . B E (A D A E A B) Be glorified in me.
[C] .A You set my feet to dancing. .E You set my heart on fire. . A In the presence of a thousand kings, . E You are my one desire .A I stand before You now with .C#m B A B (To Bridge - A) Trembling hands lifted high. . E A D A E A B Be glorified.
[B] . A B Be glorified in me . A B Be glorified in me . A B Be glorified . A B Be glorified
